creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
- update pnp to version 0.6.10
 - replace ${PREFIX}etc/pnp with ETCDIR
 - install sample config for apache
 - add new variable PNP_URL, adjust pkg-message
   (I need this variable for another port)

 - move to new patch format which can be maintained
   with command 'make makepatch', this makes it easier
   for everyone to write patches.

   Both patch files (patch-001/2...) containig patches
   for the same src file (samples/Makefile.in).
   Until now there is no big history on the files
   patch-00x... so it is a good time to change back to
   a format which can be easy maintained.
   (Not done for the extra-patch!)

 - sort pkg-plist so genplist can be used in future
   (I provide my ~/.genplist/pnp file)


Changelog: http://docs.pnp4nagios.org/pnp-0.6/dwnld#changelog

    * Feature: Add RRDTool Option .only-graph if graph height is below 32px to create thumbnails
    * Feature: RRDTool Option .width and .height is now allowed in templates
    * Feature: RRDTool DS Type for UOM of .c. changed from COUNTER to DERIVE
    * Feature: Pass query string from special controller to image controller ( Matthew Garrett )
    * Feature: Authorisation against mk_livestatus API added
    * Feature: Sample nginx webserver config added ( by evax@users.sourceforge.net )
    * Feature: Kohana backport to support PHP 5.1.6 ( Kudos to Andreas Ericsson )
    * Bugfix: Sort list of special templates
    * Bugfix: Urlencode hostname and service description ( Reported by Yannick )
    * Bugfix: corrected warning/critical thresholds in ticker/alerter functions

Fix: 

#!/bin/sh
#
# file ~/.genplist/pnp
# additional genplist command for net-mgmt/pnp

sed -i '' -E -e 's;^(@dirrm) (%%WWWDIR%%/templates$|%%WWWDIR%%$|%%ETCDIR%%/pages$|%%ETCDIR%%/check_commands$|%%ETCDIR%%$);\1try \2;' ${1}

+	--with-httpd-conf=${ETCDIR}

 		pkg-message

 		PNP_RRDS=${PNP_RRDS} \

@@ -79,18 +84,20 @@

-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} \
-  -e's|^\$$conf\['\''use_fpdf'\''\] = [[:digit:]];|$$conf['\''use_fpdf'\''] = ${PNP_USE_FPDF};|' \
-  -e's|^\$$conf\['\''nagios_base'\''\] = "/nagios/cgi-bin";|$$conf\['\''nagios_base'\''\] = "${NAGIOSHTMURL}/cgi-bin";|' \
-  "${WRKSRC}/sample-config/pnp/config.php.in"
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -E \
+	-e's|^\$$conf\['\''use_fpdf'\''\] = [[:digit:]];|$$conf['\''use_fpdf'\''] = ${PNP_USE_FPDF};|' \
+	-e's|^\$$conf\['\''nagios_base'\''\] = "/nagios/cgi-bin";|$$conf\['\''nagios_base'\''\] = "${NAGIOSHTMURL}/cgi-bin";|' \
+	-e 's|(/usr/local/)(check_mk)|\1share/\2|' -e 's|/usr/local/nagios/var/(rw/live)|${NAGIOSDIR}/\1|' \
+	"${WRKSRC}/sample-config/pnp/config.php.in"
 
 pre-install:
 	@PKG_PREFIX=${PREFIX} ${SH} ${PKGINSTALL} ${PKGNAME} PRE-INSTALL
 
 post-install:
 .for m in ${MAN8}
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/${m} ${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man8/${m}
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/${m} ${MAN8PREFIX}/man/man8/${m}
 .endfor
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
